result.markdown:
---
title: "Calcium (Ca) Forest site RF_Regression"
author: "Alex Koiter"
---






## Load libraries





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(randomForest)
  library(terra)
  library(caret)
  library(patchwork)
  library(sf)
  library(boot)
  library(optRF)
})
```
:::






## Load data





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
 attribute <- c("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation")

data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/forest_terrain_data.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  select("x", "y", "ca", any_of(attribute))
```
:::






## Map soil property





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
temp_rast <- rast(data)
crs(x = temp_rast, warn=FALSE) <- "epsg:26914"

coords <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/coords.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"),  crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 26914)

p1<- ggplot() +
  tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = ca)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Ca", breaks = seq(1, 4, 1)) +
  geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Forest")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") +
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")

p2 <- ggplot() +
  tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = elevation)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Elevation (m)", option = "inferno") +
  geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Forest")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") +
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-asp: 0.5
p1+p2  
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Ca_For_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=1152}
:::
:::






## RF model original 49 data points





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
x <- "ca"
data <- orig_data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/forest_data_49.csv")) |>
  select(x, any_of(attribute))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Rows: 49 Columns: 16

Delimiter: ","
dbl (16): plan_curvature, profile_curvature, saga_wetness_index, catchment_a...

```


:::

```
Warning: Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0.
в„№ Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead.

  data %>% select(x)

  # Now:
  data %>% select(all_of(x))

See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>.
```


:::
:::






### Training and test data sets





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
set.seed(222)
ind <- sample(2, nrow(data), replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.7, 0.3))
train <- data[ind==1,]
test <- data[ind==2,]
```
:::






### Feature selection





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
features <- usdm::vifstep(data.frame(select(train, all_of(attribute))), th = 10)

train <- train %>% 
  usdm::exclude(features)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Warning in usdm::exclude(., features): No variable to exclude!
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
test <- test %>% 
  usdm::exclude(features)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Warning in usdm::exclude(., features): No variable to exclude!
```


:::
:::






### Tune RF





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
my_mtry <- tuneRF(y = train[[x]], x = train[attribute], trace = TRUE, plot = TRUE) |>
  data.frame() |>
  slice(which.min(OOBError)) |>
  pull(mtry)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
mtry = 2  OOB error = 0.3129949 
Searching left ...
mtry = 1 	OOB error = 0.3518278 
-0.1240687 0.05 
Searching right ...
mtry = 4 	OOB error = 0.4116753 
-0.3152778 0.05 
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Ca_For_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::






### Fit Model





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
rf.fit <- randomForest(ca ~ ., data = train, 
                       ntree = 500, keep.forest = TRUE, importance = TRUE, mtry = my_mtry)
rf.fit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Call:
 randomForest(formula = ca ~ ., data = train, ntree = 500, keep.forest = TRUE,      importance = TRUE, mtry = my_mtry) 
               Type of random forest: regression
                     Number of trees: 500
No. of variables tried at each split: 2

          Mean of squared residuals: 0.3165698
                    % Var explained: 41.5
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
plot(rf.fit)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Ca_For_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::







### Test Model
Uses the RF model to predict the test dataset. We compare predicted against actual







::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
obs <- test[[x]]
pred <- prediction <- predict(rf.fit, newdata = test)

example <- data.frame(obs, pred)

# Define a function to compute R-squared from bootstrap samples
rsq <- function(formula, data, indices) {
  d <- data[indices, ]  # Allows boot to select resampled cases
  fit <- lm(formula, data = d)
  return(summary(fit)$r.square)
}

# Perform bootstrapping with 1000 replications
# Example: predicting mpg from wt and disp
results <- boot(
  data = example,
  statistic = rsq,
  R = 1000,
  formula = pred ~ obs
)

# View bootstrap results
test2 <- boot.ci(results, type = "perc")

r_sq_mean <- mean(test2$t)
r_sq_mean
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.2533876
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
r_sq_upper_limits <- test2$percent[5]
r_sq_upper_limits
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.6454038
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
r_sq_lower_limits <- test2$percent[4]
r_sq_lower_limits
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.01074409
```


:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)


# Define function to compute MSE on bootstrap samples
mse_boot <- function(data, indices) {
  d <- data[indices, ]  # Bootstrap sample
  mse <- mean((d$obs - d$pred)^2)
  return(mse)
}

# Bootstrap with 1000 replications
boot_results <- boot(data = example, statistic = mse_boot, R = 1000)

# Get percentile confidence interval
boot_ci <- boot.ci(boot_results, type = "perc")

# Extract lower and upper limits
mse_mean <- mean(boot_results$t)
mse_mean
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.5823339
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
mse_lower_limit <- boot_ci$percent[4]
mse_lower_limit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.3741725
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
mse_upper_limit <- boot_ci$percent[5]
mse_upper_limit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.8176934
```


:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
prediction <- predict(rf.fit, newdata = test)
test_plot <- data.frame(pred = prediction, obs = test[[x]])

r_sq <- summary(lm(pred~obs, data = test_plot))
r_sq
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Call:
lm(formula = pred ~ obs, data = test_plot)

Residuals:
     Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
-0.71198 -0.21232 -0.01576  0.15253  0.52614 

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)   1.5507     0.1952   7.943 9.41e-07 ***
obs           0.2292     0.1016   2.256   0.0394 *  
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Residual standard error: 0.3531 on 15 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.2534,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.2036 
F-statistic: 5.091 on 1 and 15 DF,  p-value: 0.03941
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
ggplot(data = test_plot, aes(y = pred, x = obs)) +
  geom_point() +
  ggpmisc::stat_poly_line() +
  ggpmisc::stat_poly_eq() +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Registered S3 methods overwritten by 'ggpp':
  method                  from   
  heightDetails.titleGrob ggplot2
  widthDetails.titleGrob  ggplot2
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Ca_For_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
mse_test <- test_plot %>%
  summarise(mse = mean((obs - pred)^2))

mse_test 
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
        mse
1 0.5802714
```


:::
:::






## Importance






::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
# Varibale Importance stability

set.seed(123)

stability_result = measure_stability(y = train[[x]], X=train[,-1], num.trees=500, method = "importance", alpha = 3/8)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Analysing random forest with 500 trees, progress: 10% 
Analysing random forest
with 500 trees, progress: 20% 
Analysing random forest with 500 trees, progress:
30% 
Analysing random forest with 500 trees, progress: 40% 
Analysing random
forest with 500 trees, progress: 50% 
Analysing random forest with 500 trees,
progress: 60% 
Analysing random forest with 500 trees, progress: 70% 
Analysing
random forest with 500 trees, progress: 80% 
Analysing random forest with 500
trees, progress: 90% 
Analysing random forest with 500 trees, progress: 100%
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
rf_stability <- stability_result$VI_stability
rf_stability
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.9809362
```


:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
ImpData <- as.data.frame(importance(rf.fit)) %>%
  mutate(Var.Names = row.names(.)) %>%
 `row.names<-`(as.character(1:nrow(importance(rf.fit))))
```
:::





### Top based on IncNodePurity





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
slice_max(ImpData,order_by = IncNodePurity, n = 10)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
     %IncMSE IncNodePurity                Var.Names
6 13.6920469     4.0170769 channel_network_distance
3  8.7602711     2.8112463       saga_wetness_index
2  6.8324020     2.5911345        profile_curvature
7  5.4038050     1.9908119                elevation
4  4.9350203     1.9788120           catchment_area
1  1.6271456     1.4931088           plan_curvature
5  0.5712598     0.8329819  relative_slope_position
```


:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
p1 <- ggplot(slice_max(ImpData,order_by = IncNodePurity, n = 10), aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), y = IncNodePurity)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), xend = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), y = 0, yend = IncNodePurity), color="skyblue") +
  geom_point(aes(size = `%IncMSE`), color = "blue", alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Terrain Attribute", y = "IncNodePurity") +
  theme(legend.position="bottom")
```
:::

  geom_segment(aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), xend = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), y = 0, yend = `%IncMSE`), color="skyblue") +

## Write data






::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
importance_data <- ImpData %>%
  mutate(MSE_rank = rank(-`%IncMSE`)) %>%
  mutate(Purity_rank = rank(-IncNodePurity)) %>%
  mutate(site = "Forest",
        property = "Ca")

if(file.exists(here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv"))) {
  importance_data_final <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv")) |>
    rows_upsert(importance_data, by = c("MSE_rank", "site", "property")) 
} else importance_data_final <- importance_data
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Rows: 161 Columns: 7
в”Ђв”Ђ Column specification в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Delimiter: ","
chr (3): Var.Names, site, property
dbl (4): %IncMSE, IncNodePurity, MSE_rank, Purity_rank

в„№ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
в„№ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
write_csv(importance_data_final, here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv"))


model_performance <- tibble(MSE = rf.fit$mse[length(rf.fit$mse)],
       Var_exp = rf.fit$rsq[length(rf.fit$rsq)],
       R2 = r_sq$r.squared, 
       mse_test = mse_test$mse,
       site = "Forest",
       property = "Ca")

if(file.exists(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_49.csv"))) {
  model_performance_final <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_49.csv")) |>
    rows_upsert(model_performance, by = c("site", "property")) 
} else model_performance_final <- model_performance
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Rows: 23 Columns: 6
в”Ђв”Ђ Column specification в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

model_performance2 <- tibble(MSE_test = paste0(round(mse_mean,2), " (", round(mse_lower_limit,2), ", ", round(mse_upper_limit,2), ")"),
       R2_test = paste0(round(r_sq_mean,2), " (", round(r_sq_lower_limits,2), ", ", round(r_sq_upper_limits,2), ")"),
       stability = round(rf_stability, 2), 
       site = "Forest",
       property = "Ca")

if(file.exists(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_2.csv"))) {
  model_performance_final2 <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_2.csv")) |>
    rows_upsert(model_performance2, by = c("site", "property")) 
} else model_performance_final2 <- model_performance2
```
